unitName: 烏龜的故事 | A tale of turtles

paragraphs.english: Turtles have existed for over 200 million years. They lived alongside the dinosaurs!
sentences: Turtles have existed for over 200 million years.
They lived alongside the dinosaurs!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 烏龜已經存在超過兩億年。牠們與恐龍同時代生活！
translation_sentences: 🌐 烏龜已經存在超過兩億年。
牠們與恐龍同時代生活！

implication.english: 💡 The opening highlights the ancient history of turtles, setting a fascinating tone.
implication.chinese: 💡 開頭強調烏龜的古老歷史，營造出有趣的氛圍。[換句話說]：烏龜早在恐龍時代就有了，真的是活化石。

paragraphs.english: On Christmas morning, my cousin and I got baby turtles as presents. My turtle was Tina. My cousin's turtle was Tanya. At one month old, our turtles were so small!
sentences: On Christmas morning, my cousin and I got baby turtles as presents.
My turtle was Tina.
My cousin's turtle was Tanya.
At one month old, our turtles were so small!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 聖誕節早上，我和表弟收到了小烏龜作為禮物。我的烏龜叫蒂娜。表弟的烏龜叫坦雅。一個月大的時候，我們的烏龜好小！
translation_sentences: 🌐 聖誕節早上，我和表弟收到了小烏龜作為禮物。
我的烏龜叫蒂娜。
表弟的烏龜叫坦雅。
一個月大的時候，我們的烏龜好小！

implication.english: 💡 Introduces the characters and the exciting gift, setting up the story.
implication.chinese: 💡 介紹人物和令人興奮的禮物，為故事鋪墊。[換句話說]：聖誕節收到小烏龜當禮物，真是驚喜！

paragraphs.english: I spent lots of time with Tina. I took her out of her tank to play from 6 p.m. to 7 p.m. every day. However, Tina was very shy. She didn't like to play.
sentences: I spent lots of time with Tina.
I took her out of her tank to play from 6 p.m. to 7 p.m. every day.
However, Tina was very shy. She didn't like to play.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我花很多時間和蒂娜在一起。我每天下午6點到7點把她從缸裡拿出來玩。但是蒂娜非常害羞，她不喜歡玩耍。
translation_sentences: 🌐 我花很多時間和蒂娜在一起。
我每天下午6點到7點把她從缸裡拿出來玩。
但是蒂娜非常害羞，她不喜歡玩耍。

implication.english: 💡 Shows the narrator's care and Tina's personality contrast.
implication.chinese: 💡 顯示敘述者的照顧以及蒂娜的性格對比。[換句話說]：我每天都會陪蒂娜玩，但她就是不太理我。

paragraphs.english: On New Year's Day, my cousin visited my house with his turtle. From 10 a.m. to noon, we spent time with our turtles. Tina stayed in her shell, but Tanya was very playful. 'Your turtle is very friendly,' I told my cousin. 'Only in the mornings. In the evenings, she gets grumpy and bites me,' he replied.
sentences: On New Year's Day, my cousin visited my house with his turtle.
From 10 a.m. to noon, we spent time with our turtles.
Tina stayed in her shell, but Tanya was very playful.
'Your turtle is very friendly,' I told my cousin.
'Only in the mornings. In the evenings, she gets grumpy and bites me,' he replied.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 元旦那天，表弟帶著他的烏龜來我家。從上午10點到中午，我們和烏龜一起玩。蒂娜待在殼裡，但坦雅非常好動。「你的烏龜很友善，」我對表弟說。「只有在早上。晚上她就會脾氣暴躁，還會咬我，」他回答。
translation_sentences: 🌐 元旦那天，表弟帶著他的烏龜來我家。
從上午10點到中午，我們和烏龜一起玩。
蒂娜待在殼裡，但坦雅非常好動。
「你的烏龜很友善，」我對表弟說。
「只有在早上。晚上她就會脾氣暴躁，還會咬我，」他回答。

implication.english: 💡 Contrasts the two turtles' behaviors, hinting at future mix-up.
implication.chinese: 💡 對比兩隻烏龜的行為，為後續的弄錯埋下伏筆。[換句話說]：我的烏龜害羞，表弟的活潑，但表弟說他的烏龜晚上會咬人。

paragraphs.english: After lunch, my cousin left with his turtle. Later, I noticed something strange about Tina. When I took her out of her tank at 6 p.m., she was quite grumpy. Then, she bit my finger! Ouch! I was really shocked at that moment. Then I realized that it wasn't Tina at all. My cousin and I mixed up our turtles!
sentences: After lunch, my cousin left with his turtle.
Later, I noticed something strange about Tina.
When I took her out of her tank at 6 p.m., she was quite grumpy.
Then, she bit my finger! Ouch!
I was really shocked at that moment.
Then I realized that it wasn't Tina at all.
My cousin and I mixed up our turtles!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 午餐後，表弟帶著他的烏龜離開了。後來，我注意到蒂娜有點奇怪。當我下午6點把她從缸裡拿出來時，她相當暴躁。然後她咬了我的手指！哎喲！那一刻我真的很震驚。然後我才意識到這根本不是蒂娜。我和表弟把烏龜弄混了！
translation_sentences: 🌐 午餐後，表弟帶著他的烏龜離開了。
後來，我注意到蒂娜有點奇怪。
當我下午6點把她從缸裡拿出來時，她相當暴躁。
然後她咬了我的手指！哎喲！
那一刻我真的很震驚。
然後我才意識到這根本不是蒂娜。
我和表弟把烏龜弄混了！

implication.english: 💡 The climax: the narrator discovers the mix-up through Tina's unusual behavior.
implication.chinese: 💡 高潮：敘述者透過蒂娜的異常行為發現弄錯了。[換句話說]：蒂娜突然變得暴躁還咬我，我才驚覺原來這是表弟的烏龜！

paragraphs.english: We met at noon the next day and switched our turtles back. I'm so glad I got my shy turtle back!
sentences: We met at noon the next day and switched our turtles back.
I'm so glad I got my shy turtle back!
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 第二天中午我們見面，把烏龜換了回來。我很高興我的害羞烏龜回來了！
translation_sentences: 🌐 第二天中午我們見面，把烏龜換了回來。
我很高興我的害羞烏龜回來了！

implication.english: 💡 Happy ending: the turtles are returned, and the narrator appreciates Tina's shy personality.
implication.chinese: 💡 快樂的結局：烏龜換回來，敘述者更珍惜蒂娜害羞的性格。[換句話說]：還好換回來了，我還是喜歡我原本那隻害羞的烏龜。
